name: What evidence proves my lawyer used ChatGPT negligently?
description: Metadata, fake cases, drafts; forensic analysis helps.

mainEntity.name: What evidence proves my lawyer used ChatGPT negligently?

acceptedAnswer.text: Metadata, fake cases, drafts; forensic analysis helps.
acceptedAnswer.description: AI-generated text patterns, timestamps, metadata, communications. Context: Courts identify hallmarks like fake citations; discovery reveals prompts. Key factors: Inconsistent case law, repetitive phrasing, no verification notes. Practical guidance: Subpoena files, use forensic tools, expert witness on AI.
